name: codex-loop
description: Codex lifecycle loop hooks for minimum-duration, rounds-based, and goal-confirmed agent work.

interface.shortDescription: Lifecycle hooks for time, rounds, or goal-confirmed Codex work.
interface.longDescription: Codex Loop keeps explicitly activated Codex tasks running until they satisfy a minimum duration, target number of deliberate rounds, or headless goal-confirmation verdict.
defaultPrompt: Install Codex Loop globally on this machine.
Set up codex-loop hooks for repeated QA and long-running implementation work.
